requirement_topic.en: BSTI Mandatory Certification for Covered Products
requirement_topic.zh: 覆盖产品的 BSTI 强制认证
requirement_topic.zht: 覆蓋產品的 BSTI 強制認證

summary.en: BSTI administers Bangladesh Standards and mandatory product certification for listed covered products. If an industrial motor model is within a covered category, the importer should secure the applicable BSTI conformity certificate or certification route before market placement and, where required, before customs release.
summary.zh: BSTI 负责孟加拉国标准和列明覆盖产品的强制产品认证。如工业电机型号属于覆盖类别，进口商应在投放市场前，并在要求时于海关放行前，取得适用的 BSTI 符合性证书或认证路径。
summary.zht: BSTI 負責孟加拉國標準和列明覆蓋產品的強制產品認證。如工業電機型號屬於覆蓋類別，進口商應在投放市場前，並在要求時於海關放行前，取得適用的 BSTI 符合性證書或認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: BSTI mandatory certification for covered products
Applicable BDS standards for industrial motors
BSTI conformity certificate requirements for listed imported products

summary.en: China CCC certificates for low-voltage motors in CCC scope, GB 18613 reports and GB 12665 evidence can support the technical file. They are not recognized as Bangladesh market approvals and should not be presented as substitutes for BSTI certification.
summary.zh: 适用低压电机的中国 CCC 证书、GB 18613 报告和 GB 12665 依据可支持技术文件。它们不被视为孟加拉国市场批准，不应作为 BSTI 认证替代。
summary.zht: 適用低壓電機的中國 CCC 證書、GB 18613 報告和 GB 12665 依據可支持技術文件。它們不被視為孟加拉國市場批准，不應作為 BSTI 認證替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: China CCC is not recognized as a Bangladesh certificate. The immediate market-access task is to confirm whether the motor is listed by BSTI and, if listed, obtain the local conformity certificate before relying on the shipment.
gap.zh: 中国 CCC 不被认可为孟加拉国证书。市场准入的首要任务是确认该电机是否被 BSTI 列明；如被列明，应先取得当地符合性证书，再安排货物。
gap.zht: 中國 CCC 不被認可為孟加拉國證書。市場准入的首要任務是確認該電機是否被 BSTI 列明；如被列明，應先取得當地符合性證書，再安排貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for products listed under BSTI mandatory certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CCC and China GB standards apply in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Verify BSTI coverage first. If covered, budget for Bangladesh certification and do not rely on China CCC as market access evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应先核查 BSTI 覆盖范围。如被覆盖，应为孟加拉国认证预留时间和成本，不要依赖中国 CCC 作为市场准入依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應先核查 BSTI 覆蓋範圍。如被覆蓋，應為孟加拉國認證預留時間和成本，不要依賴中國 CCC 作為市場准入依據。

requirement_topic.en: Import Clearance, Tariffs and Certificate Checks by NBR
requirement_topic.zh: NBR 进口清关、关税和证书核查
requirement_topic.zht: NBR 進口清關、關稅和證書核查

summary.en: The National Board of Revenue administers customs, import duties and tariff treatment. For listed products, a BSTI conformity certificate may be requested during import processing. The importer should align HS code, invoice description, model identity, certificate scope and country-of-origin documents before shipment.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国国家税务局负责海关、进口税和关税处理。对于列明产品，进口环节可能要求提供 BSTI 符合性证书。进口商应在出货前对齐 HS 编码、发票品名、型号身份、证书范围和原产地文件。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國國家稅務局負責海關、進口稅和關稅處理。對於列明產品，進口環節可能要求提供 BSTI 符合性證書。進口商應在出貨前對齊 HS 編碼、發票品名、型號身份、證書範圍和原產地文件。

standards_or_laws: BSTI certificate requirements for listed imports

summary.en: A China export pack commonly includes invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, factory test report, GB 18613 evidence, GB 12665 evidence and CCC where applicable. These documents need Bangladesh import mapping and may need a BSTI certificate for listed products.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件包通常包括发票、装箱单、原产地证、工厂测试报告、GB 18613 依据、GB 12665 依据及适用时的 CCC。这些文件需要映射至孟加拉国进口要求，列明产品还可能需要 BSTI 证书。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件包通常包括發票、裝箱單、原產地證、工廠測試報告、GB 18613 依據、GB 12665 依據及適用時的 CCC。這些文件需要映射至孟加拉國進口要求，列明產品還可能需要 BSTI 證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The import gap is not only technical. A mismatch between certificate model, HS code, invoice description or physical nameplate can delay release even when the motor design is acceptable.
gap.zh: 进口差距不只是技术问题。即使电机设计可接受，证书型号、HS 编码、发票品名或实物铭牌不一致也可能导致放行延误。
gap.zht: 進口差距不只是技術問題。即使電機設計可接受，證書型號、HS 編碼、發票品名或實物銘牌不一致也可能導致放行延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for customs processing and for listed products requiring BSTI evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory China export documents do not replace Bangladesh import checks

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Align the Bangladesh customs file with the BSTI certificate scope before shipment. China export paperwork alone may not clear a listed motor.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应将孟加拉国海关文件与 BSTI 证书范围对齐。仅有中国出口文件可能无法清关列明电机。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應將孟加拉國海關文件與 BSTI 證書範圍對齊。僅有中國出口文件可能無法清關列明電機。

requirement_topic.zh: 通过 BSTI 清单管理的 RoHS 控制
requirement_topic.zht: 通過 BSTI 清單管理的 RoHS 控制

summary.en: Bangladesh RoHS-related controls should be checked through the BSTI schedule and applicable product coverage, rather than assumed to operate as a standalone EU-style RoHS regime. For motors with electronic components, drives or control boards, restricted-substance declarations may still be requested as part of the product file or buyer requirement.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国 RoHS 相关控制应通过 BSTI 清单和适用产品覆盖范围核查，而不应假设其为欧盟式独立 RoHS 制度。对于含电子部件、驱动器或控制板的电机，受限物质声明仍可能作为产品文件或买方要求被索取。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國 RoHS 相關控制應通過 BSTI 清單和適用產品覆蓋範圍核查，而不應假設其為歐盟式獨立 RoHS 制度。對於含電子部件、驅動器或控制板的電機，受限物質聲明仍可能作為產品文件或買方要求被索取。

standards_or_laws: BSTI schedule for applicable product and substance controls
BSTI mandatory certification where product is covered
Buyer or importer restricted-substance documentation requirements

summary.en: China motor files may include GB 18613, GB 12665, CCC and supplier material declarations. China RoHS or supplier declarations, if available, are useful supporting documents but are not the same as Bangladesh BSTI schedule coverage.
summary.zh: 中国电机文件可能包括 GB 18613、GB 12665、CCC 和供应商材料声明。如有中国 RoHS 或供应商声明，可作为支持文件，但不等同于孟加拉国 BSTI 清单覆盖。
summary.zht: 中國電機文件可能包括 GB 18613、GB 12665、CCC 和供應商材料聲明。如有中國 RoHS 或供應商聲明，可作為支持文件，但不等同於孟加拉國 BSTI 清單覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613 (IE efficiency classes, aligned with IEC 60034-30-1 direction)
CCC for motors below 1 kV where in CCC scope

gap.en: The gap is classification. Do not copy an EU RoHS compliance route into Bangladesh; check whether the relevant BSTI schedule or buyer contract asks for restricted-substance evidence for the motor or its electronics.
gap.zh: 差距在于分类。不要将欧盟 RoHS 合规路径照搬到孟加拉国；应核查相关 BSTI 清单或买方合同是否要求电机或其电子件提供受限物质依据。
gap.zht: 差距在於分類。不要將歐盟 RoHS 合規路徑照搬到孟加拉國；應核查相關 BSTI 清單或買方合約是否要求電機或其電子件提供受限物質依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where included in BSTI schedule or import or buyer requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where China substance-control rules or buyer requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Bangladesh RoHS as a BSTI-schedule and product-coverage question. Avoid using an EU-style standalone RoHS assumption.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将孟加拉国 RoHS 视为 BSTI 清单和产品覆盖问题。避免采用欧盟式独立 RoHS 假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將孟加拉國 RoHS 視為 BSTI 清單和產品覆蓋問題。避免採用歐盟式獨立 RoHS 假設。
